data.task_instructions: Read the loaded paper and extract exactly one disease assertion candidate: the Pkd1 mouse model of autosomal dominant polycystic kidney disease. Preserve disease mention, model organism/subject context, role, and one record_evidence span-backed evidence record. Do not perform disease ontology lookup in the extractor.
